name: Shared Element
description: A named element morphs seamlessly between pages — the browser handles geometry interpolation while everything else fades in. Perfect for card-to-detail, avatar-to-profile, and any layout where a visual element persists across routes.
demoAnimations: @keyframes se-grid-fade { 0% { opacity: 1; } 100% { opacity: 0; } } @keyframes se-detail-enter { 0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(12px); } 100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } } @keyframes se-detail-exit { 0% { opacity: 1; } 100% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); } } .se-grid-fade { animation: se-grid-fade 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) forwards; } .se-detail-enter { animation: se-detail-enter 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) 0.25s both; } .se-detail-exit { animation: se-detail-exit 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) forwards; }

files.content:
export { SharedCard } from "./SharedCard"
export { SharedTarget } from "./SharedTarget"
